ab: nengi isu, ngid isu Rasa tu niana?
en: A: Hello, what are you looking for?

ab: Rasa pa iku tu ussiq awa.
en: B: I want to buy a cup.

ab: nengi isu, ngid isu Rasa tu niana?
en: A: Hello, what are you looking for?

ab: Rasa pa iku tu ussiq kubu.
en: B: I want to buy a hat.

ab: Rasa pa iku tu ussiq awa, baliw imu ni?
ch: A:我要買杯子，你們有賣嗎?
en: A: I want to buy a cup, do you sell them?

ab: yau, ngid isu Rasa tu utani?
en: B: Yes, how many do you want to buy?

ab: baliw imu tu dadas ni?
en: A: Do you sell betel nut?

ab: mai, mai imi baliw tu dadas.
en: B: No, we don't sell betel nut.

ab: ngid iku Rasa tu beRas.
en: A: I want to buy rice.

ab: Rasa pa isu tu utani tabu?
en: B: How many packs do you want to buy?

ab: bula iku tu utulu tabu.
en: A: Give me three packs.

ab: ngid iku Rasa tu qawpiR.
en: A: I want to buy sweet potatoes.

ab: mabaliw ti meniz qawpiR.
en: B: All the sweet potatoes are sold out.

ab: ngid iku Rasa tu uzusa peRasku siti.
en: A: I want to buy two bottles of oil.

ab: sapeRasku ti ma ya siti niaq.
en: B: We only have one bottle of oil left.

ab: panmu iku matiw meRasa tu tiRuR.
en: A: Go buy me eggs.

ab: Rasa pa isu tu utani laluyan?
en: B: How many pounds do you want to buy?

ab: Rasa pa isu tu utani laluyan tiRuR?
en: A: How many pounds of eggs do you want to buy?

ab: Rasa pa iku tu uzusa laluyan.
en: B: I want to buy two catties.

ab: Rasa pa iku tu uzusa qepeR kenaw.
en: A: I want to buy two green onions.

ab: utulu ti ma qepeRan, niza ka isu bula!
en: B: There are three left, all for you!

ab: zau satabu beRas utani kelisiw?
en: A: How much is this bag of rice?

ab: ussiq tabu uzusa Rasibu kelisiw,
en: B: $200 for a pack.

ab: uzusa betin yau ussiq kelisiw meniz, qauzusa betin kelisiw nengi ti.
en: A:The total is $21, just count $20.

ab: wanay.
en: B: Thank you.

ab: usiwa betin yau ulima kelisiw tazian.
en: A: Here's $95.

ab: Rasa pa iku muman tu qakiya, patuzus tu Rasibu kelisiw.
en: B: I'll buy some more, and make up 100 yuan.

ab: ulima Rasibu yau ussiq kelisiw meniz.
en: A:All $510.

ab: ulima Rasibu kelisiw aka sabidang nengi ni?
en: B: Count me in for $500, okay?

ab: siRis dames zau, qanengi saizan sabidang tu kiya ni?
ch: A:這個太貴了，可以算便宜一點嗎?
en: A: It's too expensive, can you make it cheaper?

ab: qasukaw, mesaiz ti nazau.
ch: B:不行，這個已經很便宜了。
en: B: No, this is already very cheap.

ab: ngid iku tu zau satabu kukuy.
en: A: I want this packet of cookies.

ab: zau kukuy utulu betin kelisiw, ngid pama tu zuma Ribang ni?
ch: B:這餅乾30元，還需要別的東西嗎?
en: B: $30 for the cookies, anything else you need?
